meta.code_note: Code facts read from the running production django image, built from commit a70a837; commits between a70a837 and HEAD are documentation-only, so the code is identical to HEAD.
meta.data_note: All database figures are read-only queries against the production Postgres (game-mvc-postgres) via the production django container over DOCKER_HOST.

source.occupancy: ItemDefinition.objects.all() -> union of valid_slots by item_type

source.damage_path: django/src/apps/shyland/management/commands/run_tick_engine.py: NPC-attacks-character branch — base_damage = uniform(str*0.8, str*1.2); calculate_damage(base, 0, 1.0, 1.0, hit_result, is_focus_target=True); apply_npc_effects runs after damage (captured as on_hit_effects)
source.blessed_hit_rates: v21 #101 ruling: 55%/45%/45% by tier (per the brief)

acuity_damage_modifier.rule: clamped to [0.1, 1.9]; neutral inside the Origin band; above band_high: 1.0 + (a - band_high), focus target only; below band_low: 1.0 - (band_low - a), always applies
acuity_damage_modifier.bounds_note: modifier range is [1.0 - (band_low - 0.1), 1.0 + (1.9 - band_high)] per character band
